issues.detail: The skill file does not explicitly cover error scenarios or edge cases.
The skill file contains verbose explanatory sections that could be trimmed for conciseness.

scenarios.name: subfinder to httpx to nuclei recon pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gets the rough shape but uses -l flags instead of stdin piping and omits the cves/ template path; treatment uses the documented cat subs.txt | httpx -silent and nuclei -t cves/ -severity critical,high chain.

scenarios.name: Source-attributed enumeration with rate limiting and API key config
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents --sources and --rate flags and is vague about the config path; treatment uses -cs and -rate-limit and points to ~/.config/subfinder/provider-config.yaml with the correct censys api-id:api-secret format.
